# ApneSoftware

> Free, browser-only tools — text, image, PDF, calculators/converters, developer and SEO utilities. Everything runs client-side in the browser; no file or form data is uploaded to a server. No AI is used inside the tools themselves. Bilingual (Hindi + English) content on every page.

## Text Tools

- [Case Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/case-converter.html): Convert UPPERCASE / lowercase
- [Citation Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/citation-generator.html): APA, MLA, Chicago, Harvard, IEEE, Vancouver and more — 15 styles, 20 source types, sortable bibliography, 8 export formats.
- [DOCX Viewer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/docx-viewer.html): View the contents of a Word (.docx) file directly in your browser, no download needed.
- [Duplicate Line Remover](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/duplicate-line-remover.html): Remove duplicate lines
- [Fancy Text Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/fancy-text-generator.html): Turn plain text into stylish Unicode fonts for bios and social media.
- [Find and Replace Text](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-find-replace.html): Find and replace text instantly, with case-sensitive, whole-word, and regex options.
- [JSON Formatter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/json-formatter.html): Clean up and format JSON
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/lorem-ipsum-generator.html): Placeholder text by paragraphs, words, lists & tables — HTML/Markdown/JSON output & templates
- [Markdown to HTML](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/markdown-to-html.html): Convert Markdown to clean HTML — live GFM editor, syntax highlighting, stats & export
- [Number to Words Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/number-to-words.html): Numbers & amounts to words — Indian/International system, English/Hindi, 10 currencies, cheque layout, reverse, batch & export
- [Password Strength Checker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/password-strength-checker.html): See exactly how strong a password is and what's missing.
- [Reverse Text Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/reverse-text.html): Reverse the letters, word order, or lines of any text instantly.
- [SEO Slug Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/slug-generator.html): Clean, URL-safe slugs with custom separators, multilingual transliteration, stop-word removal, batch mode and export.
- [Text & Code Diff Checker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-diff.html): Compare text/code — word/line/char diffs, side-by-side & unified views, stats & export
- [Text Cleaner](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-cleaner.html): Remove blank lines, trim whitespace, and clean up messy pasted text.
- [Text Encrypt & Decrypt](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-encrypt-decrypt.html): Password-protect text with AES-256-GCM in your browser — strength meter, files, formats
- [Text Line Sorter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-line-sorter.html): Sort lines of text alphabetically, numerically, by length, or randomly.
- [Text Readability Score Analyzer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-readability-score.html): 10 readability formulas, full text statistics, vocabulary, passive voice, keyword density and charts — all in your browser.
- [Text to Binary Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-binary-converter.html): Convert text to binary code and binary back to text.
- [Text to Hex Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-hex-converter.html): Convert text to hexadecimal code and hex back to text.
- [Text to Speech](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/text-to-speech.html): Convert text into speech
- [Word Counter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/word-counter.html): Count words, characters and lines
- [Words to Number Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/words-to-number.html): Convert spelled-out numbers like 'two hundred fifty' back into digits.

## Image Tools

- [Batch Image Compressor & Resizer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/batch-image-compressor.html): Compress, resize, convert, rotate and watermark many images at once — unlimited drag-sortable queue, max-dimensions/percentage/exact resize, JPG/PNG/WebP output with quality control, per-file before/after size stats, individual or one-click ZIP download. 100% local.
- [Before/After Comparison Slider](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/before-after-slider.html): Compare two images with 7 modes — horizontal/vertical slider, circle reveal, split, side-by-side, overlay & fade — plus zoom, pan, pixel-difference analysis, custom labels and PNG/JPG/WebP/PDF/SVG export
- [Brightness & Contrast Adjuster](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-brightness-contrast.html): Fine-tune brightness, contrast, and saturation of any photo with live sliders.
- [Compress Image to Target Size (KB)](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/compress-to-target-size.html): Compress a photo to an exact file size in KB — perfect for forms with strict upload limits.
- [EXIF Viewer & Remover](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/exif-viewer-remover.html): Inspect all hidden EXIF, GPS, IPTC & XMP metadata in photos and strip it out — with a privacy score, GPS alerts, selective removal, exports and batch. 100% local.
- [Favicon Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/favicon-generator.html): Turn one image into a complete favicon set — favicon.ico, PNG, Apple touch, Android, maskable & Microsoft tile icons — with background, crop & manifest controls, browser previews and a ready ZIP. 100% local.
- [GIF Maker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/gif-maker.html): Turn images into a looping animated GIF — frame timeline with drag reorder/duplicate/delete, FPS/delay, reverse, ping-pong and random order, crossfade, canvas sizes, background, filters, a caption, a live play/pause preview and GIF export with quality & dithering. 100% local, no watermark.
- [HEIC to JPG/PNG Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/heic-to-jpg-converter.html): Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG or PNG right in your browser.
- [ID Card Crop & Print](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/id-card-crop-print.html): Auto-crop & print ID card front+back on one page
- [Image Blur Tool](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-blur-tool.html): Apply an adjustable blur effect to any photo with a live preview.
- [Image Border & Frame Adder](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-border-frame.html): Add solid, double, dashed, gradient or neon borders and decorative frames (Polaroid, wooden, golden, vintage, gallery, film) to photos — with per-side widths, corner radius, shadow, captions and PNG/JPG/WebP export. 100% local.
- [Image Collage Maker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-collage-maker.html): Combine multiple photos into one collage — grid & masonry layouts, social-media canvas sizes, per-photo zoom/pan/rotate/flip, spacing, rounded corners, borders, gradient or transparent background, filters, a title, reorder/remove and PNG/JPG/WebP export. 100% local, no watermark.
- [Image Color Palette Extractor](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-color-palette.html): Extract dominant/vibrant/muted colors in HEX/RGB/HSL/CMYK/LAB with WCAG contrast, harmonies, gradients & export to PNG/SVG/CSS/ASE
- [Image Compressor](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-compressor.html): Reduce image file size
- [Image Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-converter.html): Convert JPG ⇄ PNG ⇄ WEBP
- [Image Cropper](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-cropper.html): Crop JPG/PNG/WebP with 8 resize handles, fixed aspect ratios, social & passport presets, circular & rounded crops, rotate, flip, rule-of-thirds grid, live preview and PNG/JPG/WebP export. 100% local.
- [Image Pixelator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-pixelator.html): Pixelate or blur faces, license plates, signatures and sensitive details before sharing — rectangle/ellipse/brush selection, mosaic/blur/black-bar styles, adjustable block size, feather and opacity, zoom, before/after compare, undo/redo and PNG/JPG/WebP export. 100% local; the hidden pixels are permanently replaced.
- [Image Resizer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-resizer.html): Resize an image
- [Image Resolution & DPI Checker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-resolution-checker.html): Check dimensions, size, and print size
- [Image Rotate & Flip](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-rotate-flip.html): Rotate JPG/PNG/WebP left/right 90°, 180° or by any custom angle with an auto-expanding canvas and transparent/white/black/custom background, flip H/V, undo/redo, live preview and PNG/JPG/WebP export. 100% local.
- [Image Splitter (Grid Maker)](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-grid-splitter.html): Cut a photo into a grid of equal pieces — perfect for Instagram 3x3 grid posts.
- [Image to Text (OCR)](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-to-text.html): Recognize text inside a photo
- [Image Watermark Adder](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-watermark.html): Stamp text or logo/PNG watermarks on photos — drag to place, rotate, set opacity, tile or diagonal patterns, batch-watermark many images to a ZIP. Export JPG/PNG/WebP. 100% local.
- [Meme Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/meme-generator.html): Turn any image into a meme — classic top/bottom Impact captions plus unlimited draggable text layers and emoji stickers, fonts, colours, outline, shadow, image filters, social-media canvas sizes, undo/redo and PNG/JPG/WebP export. 100% local, no watermark.
- [Passport Photo Maker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/passport-photo-maker.html): Make passport-size photos
- [Photo Filters](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/photo-filters.html): Apply 17+ filter presets (grayscale, sepia, vintage, warm, cool, noir, cinematic, autumn and more) to photos, fine-tune brightness/contrast/saturation/hue/blur, add vignette & film grain, rotate/flip, compare before/after with a live histogram, and export PNG/JPG/WebP. 100% local.
- [QR & Barcode Scanner](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/qr-code-scanner.html): Decode a QR code or barcode from an image, screenshot, clipboard paste or live camera — reads QR, Code 128/39, EAN, UPC, PDF417, Data Matrix, Aztec and ITF, detects URL/WiFi/vCard/email/phone/geo, with copy/open/share/print, TXT/CSV/JSON export and scan history. 100% local.
- [RGB to HEX Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/rgb-hex-converter.html): Convert colors between RGB, HEX, and HSL formats instantly with live preview.
- [Rounded Corners & Circle Crop](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-rounded-corners.html): Round an image's corners or crop into a circle, oval, squircle, hexagon, star, heart & more — with radius control, background (transparent/solid/gradient), border, drop-shadow, undo/redo and PNG/JPG/WebP export. 100% local.
- [Social Media Image Resizer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/social-media-resizer.html): Resize any image to exact Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, LinkedIn, X, Pinterest, TikTok and WhatsApp sizes — 60+ platform presets, custom size with aspect lock & units, fill/fit/stretch, blur/gradient/transparent padding, adjustments, filters, watermark, batch ZIP and PNG/JPG/WebP export. 100% local.
- [Solid-Color Background Remover](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/solid-bg-remover.html): Make a flat, solid-colored background transparent — eyedropper & auto corner detection, multi-color removal, tolerance, feather and edge cleanup, before/after compare, background replacement (transparent/white/black/solid) and export a transparent PNG, WebP or matted JPG. 100% local.

## PDF Tools

- [Add Image to PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-add-image.html): Place a photo, logo or stamp on a page
- [Bates Numbering](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-bates-numbering.html): Sequential numbering across documents
- [Certificate & ID Card Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/certificate-generator.html): Bulk-generate certificates & ID cards from CSV/XLSX — drag-and-drop text, QR, barcode, photo & signature fields, template library, validation, and PDF/PNG/JPG/ZIP/SVG export
- [CSV to PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/csv-to-pdf.html): Convert a CSV spreadsheet into a neatly formatted PDF table.
- [Draw & Annotate PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-annotate.html): Freehand draw and highlight directly on PDF pages
- [Excel to PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/excel-to-pdf.html): Convert spreadsheet to PDF table
- [Extract Images from PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-extract-images.html): Pull out embedded photos as files
- [Extract Table from PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-extract-table.html): Pull a table out as CSV
- [HTML to PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/html-to-pdf.html): Premium in-browser HTML to PDF converter — syntax-highlighted editor, live device preview, page/margin/quality settings, header/footer/watermark, metadata, real clickable links and in-PDF table of contents, 12 templates, batch conversion. 100% in your browser.
- [Image to PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/image-to-pdf.html): Create a PDF from photos
- [Invoice & Billing Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/invoice-generator.html): Create professional GST invoices, tax invoices, proforma invoices, quotations and receipts with a live preview — CGST/SGST/IGST, per-item HSN/discount, amount in words, UPI payment QR, bank details, autosave and export to PDF, PNG, Word, HTML or JSON. 100% local, no login.
- [Letter Template Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/letter-template-generator.html): Fill in a simple form to generate a properly formatted formal letter as PDF.
- [Markdown to PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/markdown-to-pdf.html): Convert Markdown (.md) files to a formatted PDF document.
- [PDF Booklet & N-up Printing Tool](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-booklet-nup.html): Impose 2/4/6/8/9/16 pages per sheet or a custom grid, make a saddle-stitch booklet — with paper sizes (A3–A5/Letter/Legal/Tabloid), margins, gutter, scaling, rotation, page order/range, watermark, headers, crop/registration marks, preview and batch ZIP
- [PDF Bookmark & TOC Editor](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-bookmark-editor.html): Create, edit, and organize nested PDF bookmarks and auto-generate a table of contents entirely in your browser.
- [PDF Compare](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-compare.html): Find differences between two PDFs
- [PDF Compress](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-compress.html): Reduce PDF file size
- [PDF Crop](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-crop.html): Crop PDF pages
- [PDF Delete Pages](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-delete-pages.html): Remove pages from a PDF
- [PDF Duplicate Pages](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-duplicate-pages.html): Duplicate selected pages within a PDF
- [PDF Edit](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-edit.html): Add text, highlights, boxes
- [PDF Extract Text](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-extract-text.html): Copy text out of a PDF
- [PDF Form Creator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-form-creator.html): Turn a PDF into a fillable form
- [PDF Form Filler](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-form-filler.html): Fill and lock PDF forms
- [PDF Form Flattening Tool](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-flatten-form.html): Analyse & flatten filled PDF form fields (text/checkbox/radio/dropdown/signature) into permanent content, or lock read-only — with watermark, metadata edit/remove, optimisation, validation, before/after preview and batch ZIP
- [PDF Grayscale](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-grayscale.html): Convert PDF to black & white
- [PDF Header/Footer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-header-footer.html): Add header & footer text
- [PDF Hyperlink Extractor](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-hyperlink-extractor.html): Extract every clickable link from a PDF along with its page number.
- [PDF Info](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-info.html): See full PDF details
- [PDF Merge](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-merge.html): Combine multiple PDFs into one
- [PDF Metadata Editor](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-metadata-editor.html): Edit title, author, subject, keywords
- [PDF OCR](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-ocr.html): Extract text from scanned PDFs
- [PDF Page Numbers](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-page-numbers.html): Add page numbers
- [PDF Redact](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-redact.html): Hide sensitive info, truly removable
- [PDF Reorder Pages](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-reorder.html): Change the order of pages
- [PDF Repair](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-repair.html): Best-effort fix for damaged PDFs
- [PDF Rotate](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-rotate.html): Rotate pages
- [PDF Sign](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-sign.html): Add your signature to a PDF
- [PDF Split](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-split.html): Extract pages from a PDF
- [PDF to Excel](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-to-excel.html): Convert PDF table to .xlsx
- [PDF to JPG/PNG](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-to-image.html): Turn pages into images
- [PDF to Long Image](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-to-long-image.html): Stitch PDF pages into one long image, horizontal strip, grid or contact sheet — export JPG/PNG/WebP/BMP/TIFF with DPI control, page selection, rotation, margins, background, borders, watermark, WhatsApp/Instagram widths, auto-split and batch ZIP
- [PDF to Markdown](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-to-markdown.html): Extract PDF text and convert it into clean Markdown with headings preserved.
- [PDF to Word](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-to-word.html): Convert PDF text to .docx
- [PDF Viewer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-viewer.html): View a PDF online
- [PDF Watermark](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-watermark.html): Add a text watermark
- [Professional PDF to HTML Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-to-html.html): Extract headings, paragraphs, lists, tables, images and hyperlinks from any PDF into clean HTML — six conversion modes, batch/ZIP support and OCR for scanned pages, 100% in your browser.
- [Protect PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-protect.html): Add password & restrict printing/copying
- [Resume & CV Builder](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/resume-builder.html): Build a professional resume with a live preview — ATS-friendly, modern, minimal, executive and creative templates, photo, unlimited experience/education/projects, skills, custom sections, a rule-based ATS resume score, autosave and export to PDF, PNG, Word, HTML, TXT or JSON. 100% local, no signup.
- [Search PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-search.html): Find a word or phrase across every page of a PDF
- [TXT to PDF Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/txt-to-pdf.html): Page settings, fonts, headers/footers, watermark, metadata, batch/ZIP conversion, AES encryption and live preview.
- [Unlock PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pdf-unlock.html): Remove password (must know it)
- [Word to PDF](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/word-to-pdf.html): Convert .docx to PDF

## Calculators & Converters

- [Advanced Advance Tax Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/advance-tax-calculator.html): Quarterly advance tax instalments, 234B/234C interest, old vs new regime — for individuals, HUF, firms, LLPs and companies.
- [Age Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/age-calculator.html): Find your exact age
- [Average Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/average-calculator.html): Calculate mean, median, mode, range, and sum for any set of numbers.
- [Bank Reconciliation Tool](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/bank-reconciliation-tool.html): Match Bank Statement and Cash Book/Ledger transactions instantly, auto-detect matched, unmatched and duplicate entries, and generate a professional Bank Reconciliation Statement (BRS) — import Excel/CSV/TXT or enter manually, 100% in your browser.
- [Bill Split & Tip Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/tip-calculator.html): Split any bill with tip, GST/VAT tax, service charge & discounts — equally, by shares, custom or item-wise across named people, with rounding, printable receipt, 8 currencies and PDF/CSV/Excel/PNG export plus WhatsApp/QR share
- [BMI Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/bmi-calculator.html): Body Mass Index with category, healthy & ideal weight, waist ratio and history
- [Body Fat Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/body-fat-calculator.html): Estimate body fat percentage using the US Navy method based on body measurements.
- [Break Even Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/break-even-calculator.html): Find the exact units you need to sell to cover all costs and start making profit.
- [Capital Gain Tax Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/capital-gain-tax-calculator.html): Instant Short-Term and Long-Term Capital Gain tax for property, shares, mutual funds and gold — Cost Inflation Index, the July 2024 Budget rate changes, Section 54/54EC/54F/54B/54D/54GB exemptions, Surcharge and Cess, 100% in your browser.
- [Cheque Printing Tool](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/cheque-printing-tool.html): Print payee, amount and date onto your own valid, pre-issued bank cheque leaves — 27 bank layouts, signature/stamp/logo, cheque book manager, party master, batch printing, reports, QR/barcode, OCR auto-fill. 100% in your browser.
- [Compound Interest & Investment Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/compound-interest-calculator.html): Model Lump Sum, SIP, SWP, FD, RD, PPF, NPS, mutual fund, retirement & education plans with daily-to-continuous compounding, inflation & tax adjustment, CAGR, charts, growth table and CSV/Excel/PDF export
- [Date & Time Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/date-difference-calculator.html): Difference between dates in years/months/days/hours, add/subtract time, business & working days with custom holidays, age with zodiac & birthday countdown, event countdowns, leap year, calendar & timeline — DD/MM/YYYY formats, English/Hindi and CSV/PDF export
- [EMI Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/emi-calculator.html): Work out your loan EMI
- [FD Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/fd-calculator.html): Calculate Fixed Deposit maturity amount, interest earned, and effective annual return.
- [Gratuity Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/gratuity-calculator.html): Calculate gratuity amount payable under the Payment of Gratuity Act, India.
- [GST Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/gst-calculator.html): Add or remove GST, split into CGST/SGST/IGST, apply cess, discounts & charges, convert to words and export
- [Health & Education Cess Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/health-education-cess-calculator.html): Instant 4% Health & Education Cess on Income Tax and Surcharge, with Rebate u/s 87A, Relief u/s 89, MAT/AMT Credit and Net Tax Payable or Refund — FY 2023-24 to FY 2026-27, 100% in your browser.
- [Health & Nutrition Calculator (BMR, TDEE, Macros)](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/bmr-calorie-calculator.html): BMR & TDEE with 7 formulas (Mifflin-St Jeor, Harris-Benedict, Katch-McArdle & more), calorie targets, protein/carb/fat macros, BMI, US-Navy body fat, water intake, meal planning, charts and PDF/CSV export in metric & imperial
- [HRA Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/hra-calculator.html): Calculate House Rent Allowance exemption and taxable HRA under Indian tax rules.
- [IFSC Code Finder](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/ifsc-code-finder.html): Validate an 11-character IFSC code, decode the bank name, search by bank name, check MICR/SWIFT format, scan a cheque image, or generate a QR code — 55+ major Indian banks, 100% in your browser.
- [In-Hand Salary Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/salary-calculator.html): Calculate take-home salary from CTC including PF, professional tax, and TDS.
- [Income Tax Calculator (India)](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/income-tax-calculator.html): Compare New vs Old regime with itemised deductions, rebate, surcharge, cess, net payable & export — FY 2025-26 & 2026-27
- [Journal Entry Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/journal-entry-generator.html): Create professional double-entry journal vouchers, auto-validate debit-credit balance, calculate GST (CGST/SGST/IGST/UTGST/CESS) and TDS, and generate export-ready printable vouchers — 23 ready templates, 100% in your browser.
- [LCM & HCF Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/lcm-hcf-calculator.html): Calculate the Least Common Multiple and Highest Common Factor of any numbers.
- [Percentage & Discount Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/percentage-discount-calculator.html): 30+ percentage calculators — of/what-percent, change, discount, profit, margin, markup, GST/VAT, ROI, CAGR, marks & conversions with formula and steps
- [PF Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/pf-calculator.html): Calculate EPF contributions, employer share, and projected retirement corpus.
- [PPF Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/ppf-calculator.html): Calculate Public Provident Fund corpus and interest over the investment period.
- [Presumptive Tax Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/presumptive-tax-calculator.html): Instant Presumptive Income and Tax Liability under Sections 44AD, 44ADA and 44AE — eligibility checks, turnover/receipt limits, vehicle-based rates, deductions, Surcharge and Cess, 100% in your browser.
- [Professional Leave Encashment Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/leave-encashment-calculator.html): Daily salary, eligible leave, gross encashment and Section 10(10AA) tax exemption for government, private, PSU, contract and daily-wage employees — retirement, resignation, superannuation and death settlement, 100% in your browser.
- [Professional Tax Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/professional-tax-calculator.html): State-wise Professional Tax for Maharashtra, Karnataka, West Bengal, Telangana, Tamil Nadu, Gujarat, Kerala, Assam, Bihar, Odisha and more — Employee, Employer and Self-Employed modes, exemption checker, 100% in your browser.
- [Professional TCS Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/tcs-calculator.html): TCS on sale of goods 206C(1H), motor vehicles, scrap, timber, foreign remittance (LRS) and overseas tour packages — with PAN/206CC and GST-inclusive handling, 100% in your browser.
- [Professional TDS Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/tds-calculator.html): TDS on salary, contractor, professional fees, commission, rent, property purchase, interest, dividend, e-commerce and crypto — with PAN/206AA and Section 197 handling, 100% in your browser.
- [Profit & Loss Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/profit-loss-calculator.html): Calculate profit, loss, profit percentage, and loss percentage for any transaction.
- [Ratio Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/ratio-calculator.html): Simplify ratios, solve for missing values, and divide quantities in a given ratio.
- [RD Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/rd-calculator.html): Calculate Recurring Deposit maturity amount and total interest earned.
- [ROI Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/roi-calculator.html): Calculate Return on Investment and annualized ROI (CAGR) for any investment.
- [Simple Interest Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/simple-interest-calculator.html): Calculate simple interest, total amount payable, and interest earned.
- [SIP Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/sip-calculator.html): Estimate mutual fund SIP maturity value
- [Standard Deviation Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/standard-deviation-calculator.html): Calculate standard deviation, variance, and mean for any dataset.
- [Stock Average Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/stock-average-calculator.html): Average share price across multiple buys, target average, sell P&L, SIP, brokerage, tax, position size & portfolio.
- [Surcharge Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/surcharge-calculator.html): Income Tax Surcharge, Marginal Relief and Health & Education Cess for Individuals, HUF, Firms, LLPs, Domestic/Foreign Companies and Co-operative Societies — FY-wise slabs from FY 2023-24 to FY 2026-27, 100% in your browser.
- [SWP Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/swp-calculator.html): Plan a Systematic Withdrawal Plan — monthly income, corpus longevity & exhaustion date
- [Unit Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/unit-converter.html): Convert length, area, volume, weight, temperature, speed, data and more — 18+ categories, 200+ units
- [Water Intake Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/water-intake-calculator.html): Calculate your daily water requirement based on weight, activity, and climate.
- [Working Days Calculator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/working-days-calculator.html): Count working days between two dates excluding weekends and holidays.

## Developer & Utility

- [Barcode Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/barcode-generator.html): Generate & scan CODE128/EAN/UPC/QR and more, with barcode info, label designer, batch CSV and PNG/SVG/PDF export
- [Base64 Encoder & Decoder](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/base64-encoder-decoder.html): Encode text or files to Base64 (or Base32, Hex, Binary, ASCII85) and decode Base64 to text, image, PDF, audio or video with preview. URL-safe mode, validator, Data URI snippets, batch ZIP, export. 100% local.
- [Code Preview](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/code-preview.html): Live HTML/CSS/JS editor with preview. Upload website ZIP to preview in browser.
- [Color Picker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/color-picker.html): Pick colours; convert HEX/RGB/HSL/CMYK/OKLCH; palettes, gradients, WCAG contrast & exports
- [CSS Beautifier & Minifier](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/css-beautifier-minifier.html): Format messy CSS into readable code, or minify it to shrink file size.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/css-gradient-generator.html): Design linear/radial/conic gradients with 100+ presets, live preview & export to CSS, SCSS, Tailwind, React, Flutter, SwiftUI, SVG, PNG
- [CSV ↔ JSON Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/csv-json-converter.html): Convert CSV to JSON and JSON arrays back to CSV with a live table preview, auto/custom delimiter, header & type detection, JSON validation, flatten, statistics and export to JSON/CSV/TSV/XML/XLSX. 100% local.
- [CSV Viewer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/csv-viewer.html): View, sort, and search any CSV file as a clean table in your browser.
- [Hash Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/hash-generator.html): Compute MD5, SHA-1/256/384/512, SHA3 & CRC32 hashes for text or files, verify file integrity by comparing an expected hash, pick algorithms, switch case and export TXT/JSON/CSV. 100% local.
- [HTML Beautifier & Minifier](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/html-beautifier-minifier.html): Format messy HTML into readable code, or minify it to shrink file size.
- [HTML Viewer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/html-viewer.html): Paste or upload HTML source and see a live rendered preview instantly.
- [JavaScript Beautifier & Minifier](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/js-beautifier-minifier.html): Format messy JavaScript into readable code, or safely minify it with Terser.
- [Password Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/password-generator.html): Strong random, passphrase, PIN, WiFi & API-key passwords with entropy & crack time
- [QR Code Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/qr-generator.html): Create QR codes for URL, WiFi, vCard, UPI & more — colors, logo, PNG/SVG/PDF
- [Regex Tester](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/regex-tester.html): Test regular expressions live with highlighted matches, capture groups, all flags (g i m s u y d), replace & split modes, match statistics, ready-made patterns (email, IP, PAN, Aadhaar, GST, IFSC) and export. 100% local.
- [Timestamp Converter](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/timestamp-converter.html): Convert Unix/JS/Java/.NET/FileTime/Excel timestamps to dates & back, across 16+ timezones, with ISO/RFC formats, date diff, batch mode & code snippets
- [URL & HTML Entity Encoder/Decoder](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/url-html-encoder-decoder.html): URL & HTML encode/decode plus JSON/XML/JS/CSS/SQL escaping, Base64, Unicode, URL parser, HTML preview, entity reference, batch & files
- [UUID Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/uuid-generator.html): Generate and validate RFC-compliant UUID v1-v8, bulk up to 1000, with formatting, export and history — all in your browser.
- [XML Viewer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/xml-viewer.html): View any XML file as a collapsible, color-coded tree.

## SEO Tools

- [Canonical URL Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/canonical-url-generator.html): Generate rel=canonical link tags. Normalize URLs, remove tracking parameters and bulk-generate canonical tags for multiple pages.
- [HTTP Headers Checker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/http-headers-checker.html): Check HTTP response headers for any URL. Analyze SEO headers, security headers and caching headers. Client-side, no server needed.
- [Keyword Density Checker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/keyword-density-checker.html): Analyze keyword frequency and density for 1-word, 2-word and 3-word phrases. Detect keyword stuffing instantly.
- [Keyword Rank Tracker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/keyword-rank-tracker.html): Check your website's real Google ranking position for keywords — single or bulk via CSV, with country/language targeting and CSV export.
- [Meta Description Checker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/meta-description-checker.html): Analyze meta description length, readability, CTR potential and keyword presence. Live SERP preview included.
- [Meta Robots Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/meta-robots-generator.html): Generate robots meta tags visually — toggle index/noindex, follow/nofollow, nosnippet, noarchive, max-snippet and more.
- [Meta Tag Analyzer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/meta-tag-analyzer.html): Paste HTML source to analyze all SEO meta tags — title, description, OG, Twitter Card, robots, canonical. Get score and tips.
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/meta-tag-generator.html): Generate complete SEO meta tags — OG, Twitter Card, robots, JSON-LD
- [Meta Title Checker](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/meta-title-checker.html): Check meta title length in characters AND pixels. Live Google SERP preview for desktop and mobile. Bulk check supported.
- [Open Graph Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/open-graph-generator.html): Generate Open Graph tags for Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp with live 4-platform social share preview.
- [Robots.txt Analyzer](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/robots-txt-analyzer.html): Paste your robots.txt to check for errors, understand all directives and test whether specific URLs are blocked for any bot.
- [Robots.txt Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/robots-txt-generator.html): Create a perfect robots.txt file visually. Block/allow specific bots, set crawl delay, add sitemap URL. Download instantly.
- [Schema Markup Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/schema-markup-generator.html): Generate JSON-LD structured data for rich results — FAQ, Article, Product, LocalBusiness, BreadcrumbList, Event and more.
- [SERP Preview Tool](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/serp-preview-tool.html): See how your page appears in Google Search results before publishing. Live desktop, mobile and news article previews.
- [Twitter Card Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/twitter-card-generator.html): Generate all 4 Twitter/X Card types with live tweet preview — summary, summary_large_image, app and player cards.
- [XML Sitemap Generator](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/xml-sitemap-generator.html): Create valid XML sitemaps manually or by pasting URLs in bulk. Set priority, changefreq and lastmod. Download sitemap.xml.

## Other Tools

- [Vedic Clock](https://apnesoftware.com/tools/vedic-clock.html): Real-time Vedic timekeeping — Ghati, Pala, Vipala, Muhurta, Prahar, Hora and complete Panchang with Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana.
